item.title: Charting Change
item.description: What does it take to make a change in your behavior or lifestyle? What influences an individual’s decisions to change a behavior? How long does it take to see results? Or, do you always see results when you make up your mind to change a habit you don’t like? These are some of the questions I try to answer through this blog post by documenting my experience using a health monitoring application for a period of approximately 4 weeks.
